title: Missing Input Validation in Promote Command
description: The promote command lacks validation for the `--build` input, which could lead to attempts to promote non-existent builds.

root_cause_potential: No validation of build parameter before promotion
Insufficient error handling for invalid build IDs
No verification of build artifacts before promotion
technical_analysis.suggested_solution: Add checks to ensure the specified build exists before proceeding

reproduction_steps: 1. Execute promote command with non-existent build ID
2. Observe command attempting to promote invalid build
3. Check for error handling and user feedback
4. Verify system state after failed promotion attempt
expected_behavior: Promote command should validate build exists and provide clear error message for invalid builds
actual_behavior: Command may attempt to promote non-existent builds without proper validation

immediate_fixes.action: Add build existence validation in promote command
immediate_fixes.rationale: Prevent promotion of invalid or non-existent builds

immediate_fixes.action: Implement comprehensive input validation for build parameters
immediate_fixes.rationale: Ensure all promotion inputs are valid before execution

immediate_fixes.action: Add clear error messages for validation failures
immediate_fixes.rationale: Provide actionable feedback to users when validation fails

impact_assessment.user_impact: Medium - Confusing errors when promoting invalid builds
impact_assessment.urgency: Medium - Should be fixed before production use
